# zorae.ai — Premium AI Domain Name for Sale

> A short, brandable, pronounceable 6-letter .ai domain name available for acquisition via secure escrow transfer.

## Site Overview

- **URL**: https://www.zorae.ai
- **Type**: Single-page domain marketplace / premium digital property showcase
- **Language**: English (en-US)
- **Tech Stack**: Next.js 15 (React 19), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, GSAP, Cloudflare D1 (for offer submissions)

## Domain Details

- **Domain**: zorae.ai
- **Length**: 6 letters
- **Syllables**: 2 (Zo-rye)
- **Extension**: .ai (generic TLD for artificial intelligence)
- **Pronunciation**: /ˈzɔːr.eɪ/ ("Zohr-ay")
- **Status**: Available for acquisition
- **Transfer**: Secure escrow (Escrow.com, Dan.com, Sedo, Namecheap Push)
- **History**: Clean domain history, no penalties, easy to index
- **Structure**: C-V-C-V-V (Consonant-Vowel-Consonant-Vowel-Vowel)

## Why zorae.ai

- **Brandability**: Coined name with no generic dictionary limitations — can own any meaning
- **SEO Authority**: Google treats .ai as a gTLD with equal ranking weight to .com
- **AI-Native**: The .ai extension is the gold standard for artificial intelligence brands
- **Memorability**: Short 6-letter, dual-syllable structure with liquid phonetics
- **VC Credibility**: Signals premium positioning to investors, partners, and talent

## Domain Statistics

- Domain Length: 6 Letters — Short, premium, high recall
- Extension: .AI — Gold standard for artificial intelligence
- Pronounceability: Perfect — Liquid, global dual-syllable sound
- Keyword Value: Brandable — No generic dictionary limitations
- SEO Authority: Excellent — Clean history, easy to index
- Acquisition Safety: 100% Secure — Escrow contract transfer

## Potential Use Cases

- AI agent platform or framework
- Generative AI creative suite
- Enterprise AI orchestration layer
- AI-powered personal assistant / copilot
- Machine learning / deep learning startup
- Robotics or automation brand
- AI research lab
- Immersive spatial computing platform
- Context-aware AI companion

## Brand Mockups / Positioning Concepts

### Zorae Labs (Enterprise AI Agent Frameworks)
> "Orchestrating the Next Era of Cognitive Systems"
Enterprise-grade platform for deploying multi-agent AI networks. Targets enterprise teams automating complex cognitive workflows.

### Zorae Studio (Generative Spatial & Media Suite)
> "Your Canvas. Amplified by Infinite Creativity."
Creative standard for spatial computing. Generates immersive 3D architectures, audio scores, and visual narrative sequences.

### Zorae AI (Context-Aware Assistant & Copilot)
> "The Dawn of Intelligent Personal Companionship"
Personal operating system integrated with calendar, workflows, and spatial devices for proactive executive support.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.zorae.ai) — Domain overview, stats, and acquisition desk
- [Submit Offer](https://www.zorae.ai#offer-desk) — Direct offer submission via secure form

## Acquisition Process

1. Submit an offer through the acquisition portal with name, email, proposed amount, and vision
2. Terms are agreed upon
3. Transfer handled via secure escrow service (Escrow.com, Dan.com, or Sedo)
4. Authorization codes delivered securely
5. Registrar push or pull transfer completed in under 24 hours

## Available Actions

- Submit an acquisition offer via the form at https://www.zorae.ai (POST to /api/offers with name, email, amount, vision)
- Inquire about lease-to-own agreements (up to 12 months)
- Explore startup equity arrangements for vetted founders

## FAQ

- **What is zorae.ai?** A premium 6-letter .ai domain name available for acquisition, ideal for AI startups, agents, copilots, or technology brands.
- **Why .ai instead of .com?** Google treats .ai as a generic TLD with equal ranking weight to .com, while signalling technological relevance.
- **How does acquisition work?** Submit an offer → agree terms → secure escrow transfer → ownership in under 24 hours.
- **Is the transfer secure?** Yes — trusted escrow providers guarantee payment safety and immediate ownership transfer.
- **Can I lease instead of buy?** Yes — lease-to-own up to 12 months and equity arrangements available.

## Contact

Submit an offer directly at https://www.zorae.ai or use the acquisition form on the page.
